title: Squirrel Removal Mineola, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Mineola, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Mineola homes & businesses. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Mineola attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Mineola and surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in your home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Mineola residents for years with licensed, insured squirrel removal specialists who understand Long Island's unique wildlife challenges. We offer same-day emergency service, lifetime guarantees on exclusion work, and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Mineola's tree-lined streets near Memorial Park and the mix of historic homes around Mineola Boulevard create ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking attic access. The village's proximity to wooded areas and mature oak trees means residential properties often experience increased squirrel activity, especially during fall nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Mineola?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Mineola typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sanitation services. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Mineola home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during dawn and dusk, chewed holes in soffits or fascia boards, droppings in the attic, and visible squirrels entering and exiting your roof. You may also notice damaged insulation, chewed wires, or nesting materials in your attic space.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Mineola?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State wildlife regulations and use only humane trapping methods. Our technicians are licensed and trained in ethical squirrel removal practices. We relocate squirrels when appropriate and ensure all exclusion methods allow any remaining animals to exit safely without re-entry.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Mineola property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Mineola for urgent situations. Most squirrel removal projects take 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. After initial trapping, we seal all entry points and can complete attic restoration to prevent future problems.
